editorial.html: **Associate Editor** — The Visual Computer (Springer), since Feb. 2025.
**Springer Nature Editor of Distinction Award 2026** — Author Service Award (top 20%).

Reviewer for IEEE (TMM, Access), ACM (JOCCH), Springer (MTAP, Computing Surveys, HSSC), Elsevier (JVCI), Taylor & Francis (IJHCI), MDPI (Applied Sciences, Sensors, Mathematics), Frontiers in Computer Science, etc.
Program Committee member at ISMAR, IEEE VR, AAAI, ACM MM, ECCV, IROS, ICIAP and others.

chair.html: **Principal Organizer** — [HUARL @ ICIAP 2025](https://sites.google.com/view/huarl-iciap-2025/) (with Prof. Primo Zingaretti, 15 Sep 2025).
Co-Chair — Special Session "FAME: Fashion for Metaverse" @ AIVR 2024 (with Dr. Pasquale Cascarano).
Tutorial Lead — "Fashion in the Metaverse" @ IFIP-ICEC 2023.

memberships.html: **XR Italia** — national community for Extended Reality (since 2026).
**CVPL** — Italian association for Computer Vision, Pattern Recognition and Machine Learning.
Representative of the Research Fellows at SPOCRI, University of Macerata (A.Y. 2024/2025, 2025/2026).
